entries.content: do you have a resume conversation command?

I’ll check the Codex/OpenAI docs guidance for the precise terminology before answering, since “resume” behavior depends on the surface you’re using.

The current Codex manual fetched successfully. I’m checking the command/reference sections now for the exact resume terminology.

Yes. In Codex CLI you have both:

- `codex resume` from the shell: opens a picker of saved sessions.
- `/resume` inside the Codex TUI: resumes a saved conversation from the session list.

Useful variants:

```bash
codex resume --last
codex resume --all
codex resume <SESSION_ID>
```

For non-interactive runs:

```bash
codex exec resume --last "Continue the task"
codex exec resume <SESSION_ID> "Continue the task"
```

Docs source: [Codex CLI reference](https://developers.openai.com/codex/cli/reference) and [Codex CLI slash commands](https://developers.openai.com/codex/cli/slash-commands).
